## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, process improvements, and 2026 goals.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Quality Fix:** GrowthX is proactively fixing linking errors (e.g., the "AI change management" 404) in the next 5 articles to reduce Udemy's review burden.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**New Cadence:** The weekly 10-article pipeline (5 for publish, 5 for review) will resume, with the first 5 articles due for review by Thursday at noon.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [**GA4 Access Block:** GrowthX remains blocked on GA4 access, preventing performance reporting. Justin is escalating the overdue procurement request.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [**CMS Publishing:** GrowthX will gain direct WordPress access by EOM Jan 2026, streamlining the publishing workflow after Udemy's review and approval.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality & Pipeline

  - [**Problem:** The first 5 articles had numerous linking errors, increasing Udemy's review effort.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX is proactively fixing the next 5 articles to ensure quality before delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Specific Errors Identified:**](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [**404 Link:** The "AI change management" link fails because the URL is missing the `guide` slug.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [**Demo Link:** A foreign-language demo link appeared. This is a known, India-specific URL and not an error.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [**New Cadence:** The standard 10-article weekly pipeline will resume.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [**This Week:** Udemy reviews 5 articles (due Thurs @ noon) → GrowthX finalizes → Udemy publishes (due Fri @ noon).](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
      - [**Next Week:** GrowthX sends 5 new articles for review.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)

### Content Enhancements

  - [**Tables:** Manual improvements are underway while the engineering team refines automation.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [**Infographics:** GrowthX will send mock-ups in 1–2 weeks to align on style before implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [**Case Studies:** The goal is 1–2 relevant links per article to provide value without becoming a white paper.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

### 2026 Goals & Reporting

  - [**Primary Goal:** Improve organic traffic and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization).](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [**Key Metrics:** Track prompts (via the fanout sheet) and general organic traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=645.0)
  - [**Pipeline Dashboard:** Justin is working with marketing ops to build a dashboard connecting organic traffic to pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [**Reporting Block:** GA4 access is still pending due to a procurement delay, preventing GrowthX from providing performance reports.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [**Workaround:** GrowthX will share Looker Studio dashboard examples next week so Justin can build a temporary report.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [GrowthX will also use its internal Scrunch platform to track prompt performance.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)

### Process & Platform Updates

  - [**Blog Redesign:** A new blog template is expected to go live this week.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [**Blog V2:** A major update with course cards is planned for completion by EOM Feb 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [**CMS Publishing:** GrowthX will get direct WordPress access by EOM Jan 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX publishes approved articles post-review.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Saves time and reduces Udemy's operational lift.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
      - [**Long-Term Idea:** Explore automated publishing from GrowthX's pipeline to WordPress.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)

### Meeting Schedule

  - [**Change:** The bi-weekly Wednesday sync will move to next week (Jan 14) to accommodate an internal Udemy meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
      - [Send 5 new articles for review by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
      - [Share Looker Studio dashboard examples with Justin next week.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [Send infographic mock-ups in 1–2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [Confirm Simran's availability for the Thursday noon deadline.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [**Udemy:**](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
      - [Complete review of the first 5 articles by Thursday, Jan 8 at noon.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
      - [Publish the first 5 articles by Friday, Jan 9 at noon.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
      - [Escalate the overdue GA4 access request.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
      - [Coordinate WordPress access for GrowthX by EOM Jan 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/z3yxkiXLwxuGKaRLEs553NSV3bWzdyD9?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
